narrative: Created WODE.md to document the purpose of this fork and provide basic instructions for customizing Claude Code. This establishes a foundation for future exploration and personal workflows.
user_input: I want to create my own fork of that "claude" for coding, explore and prepare me a WODE.md where all you learn to help be will be
scene_before: The repository only contained upstream documentation without context for personal modifications.
scene_after: Developers now have WODE.md summarizing key features and guidance for extending the tool, enabling easier onboarding and experimentation.
